posts.author: Merav (Merav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I need to add subscribers to a Monday item via API.
I found somewhere this mutation: add_subscribers_to_item but trying it in your playground I can see it is unsupported.
I found add_user to worksapce, board, team but not to a specific item.
Is it supported?
Thanks,
Merav
